core_thesis: Will Francis is a practical AI educator who demystifies new tools, models, and workflows for everyday creators and marketers. His content is built around actionable tutorials — showing exactly how to use the latest AI releases to save time, make content, and build things. A secondary thread runs through his work around AI literacy: helping audiences recognise AI-generated text, video, and media so they're not fooled by it.
key_ideas: Practical how-to tutorials for specific AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)
AI literacy and detection — spotting AI-generated text, images, and video
Portable AI identity — building a persistent, cross-platform profile that moves between LLMs
Agentic AI — autonomous agents that complete multi-step tasks rather than just answer prompts
Vibe coding / no-code app building with AI scaffolding
AI tool selection by use case — mapping the right LLM to the right job
AI policy and security risks — platform politics, browser vulnerabilities, and safety concerns
AI-assisted content creation and marketing at scale
